holdings.infoBox: PKB is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vulcan Materials Company stock at 5.26%, CRH plc at 5.20%, The Home Depot at 5.11%, Amrize AG at 5.09%, and Martin Marietta Materials at 5.06%.

overview.description: The Invesco Building & Construction ETF (PKB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks an index of building and construction companies, selected using multiple factors and weighted in tiers. PKB was launched on Oct 26, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: According to the Census Bureau, new home sales were at a seasonally adjusted annual rate of 622,000 in April. This represents a 6.2% decline from March's rate of 663,000 and an 11.3% drop from the pre...
